site.name: Mofetoleli oa Resource
site.defaultDescription: Litokomane tsa mofetoleli oa Resource GitHub Action — phetolelo ea mochini o ikemetseng oa lifaele tsa lisebelisoa ka Azure AI Translator.

drawer.open: Ho tsamaea ka mokhoa o bulehileng
drawer.title: Ho tsamaea

header.languageDescription: Tobetsa leqepheng le le leng ka puo e 'ngoe.
header.languageSearchPlaceholder: Lipuo tsa ho batla kapa lipuo tsa lehae ...
header.languageNoResults: Ha ho na lipuo tse lumellanang le filthara eo.

search.title: Litokomane tsa ho batla
search.idleHelp: Fumana lingoloa ka sehlooho, sebopeho sa faele, khetho ea tlhophiso, kapa risepe. Sebelisa {up} {down} ho tsamaea, {enter} ho bula.
search.empty: Ha ho na liphetho. Leka lentsoe le leng la bohlokoa.
search.error: Index ea ho batla ha e fumanehe ho dev. Tsamaisa kaho ea tlhahiso.

footer.taglinePrefix: GitHub Action e fetolelang lifaele tsa hau tsa lisebelisoa ka boiketsetso, e hahiloeng holim'a semmuso
